method.serial_10x: ten component calls with one final eval/synchronize
method.e2e: outer fence pair around decode loop

T4096.method: predicted_10layer_ms = read_serial_sum + 2 * write_serial_sum. Write runs 2x per step (K + V). Each serial sum is the sum of per-component serial 10x fence-corrected medians across ten distinct synthetic layer fixtures.

T8192.method: predicted_10layer_ms = read_serial_sum + 2 * write_serial_sum. Write runs 2x per step (K + V). Each serial sum is the sum of per-component serial 10x fence-corrected medians across ten distinct synthetic layer fixtures.
